title: Reflections, shattered by a thousand faces
summary: I posted something about the challenge with my writing that seemed worth capturing: A wise person tumbles a stone until smooth, makes a few choice cuts. I foolishly chisel so many facets into it again that unless you zoom in, it appears as rough as the original stone. Then I suppose, in the interest of self-reflection, I should leave this blogpost at that.
content:
I posted something about the challenge with my writing that seemed worth capturing:

A wise person tumbles a stone until smooth, makes a few choice cuts.

I foolishly chisel so many facets into it again that unless you zoom in, it appears as rough as the original stone.

Then I suppose, in the interest of self-reflection, I should leave this blogpost at that.
